final_message: All constraints check out: 167 words (≤250), exactly 4 H2 headings in order with no others, no banned words, exactly 3 bullets each under 25 words, and `summary.json` has exactly the 5 required keys with correct types/values matching the computed data (total revenue $7,154.44, 30 orders, median $204.95, top product Gadget, revenue by region for all four regions).
